name: Unboxed
description:
The protagonist moves into a futuristic condominium built under the BayRise Initiative in San Jose, Milpitas, and Redwood City. Alongside their roommate Grace, they explore a home filled with cutting edge technology, where the GPSIS system and AI butler Eva anticipate their needs, monitor the environment, and seamlessly enhance daily life.

Grace, a science fiction enthusiast, marvels at the apartment's capabilities, seeing a glimpse of a future where humans and artificial intelligence coexist. As they unpack and settle in, the two discover that this apartment is more than a home. It is a doorway to possibilities, routines, and adventures they have never imagined, where every day brings new surprises and the promise of the unknown.

You can find the complete BayRise series via the link below 🔗📚

  • BayRise Series
creator: ScreamingWolf
